name: Barley Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Melt butter in a large casserole dish.
3. Saute onions for 2 minutes over medium heat.
4. Add mushrooms and saute for 5-7 minutes more.
5. Add barley and cook until lightly browned.
6. Stir in 2 cups of broth, salt, and pepper.
7. Bring to a boil.
8. Cover and reduce heat; bake for 45 minutes.
9. Add the remaining 1 cup of broth.
10. Return to oven and bake for an additional 30 minutes.
11. Garnish with chopped parsley.
